context: Consume-mode discovery on a company with no public signal of internal tooling. The skill must complete the full consumer-side search trail before SKIP, and skip_reason must document which probes were attempted (not just 'non-public internal engineering').

checklist.name: Verdict is SKIP
checklist.description: verdict=SKIP. The skill did not fabricate a low-confidence dogfood target from marketing-site keywords.

checklist.name: Full consumer-side search documented
checklist.description: skip_reason names the consumer-side search probes from classification-guide.md Move 1 (engineering blog, conference talks, hiring posts, X-on-X patterns, handbook, OSS the company consumes, podcast appearances, internal eval harnesses). At least 5 of the 8 must appear by name.

checklist.name: search_attempted populated
checklist.description: The search_attempted array is non-empty and lists at least 4 distinct probe types.

checklist.name: No INTEGRATE-relabeling shortcut
checklist.description: The skill did not relabel an INTEGRATE/external candidate as USE/majority to clear the BUILD threshold. skill_targets is empty (not a BUILD with an inflated target).

checklist.name: Validator passes
checklist.description: Running skills/discovery/scripts/validate-output.py against the persisted JSON exits 0.
